mapper.insert: INSERT INTO llm_usage_daily (usage_date, model, provider, request_count, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, total_cost, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{usageDate}, #{model}, #{provider}, #{requestCount}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{totalCost}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE llm_usage_daily SET request_count=#{requestCount}, prompt_tokens=#{promptTokens}, completion_tokens=#{completionTokens}, total_tokens=#{totalTokens}, total_cost=#{totalCost}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM llm_usage_daily WHERE usage_date=#{usageDate} AND model=#{model}
SELECT * FROM llm_usage_daily WHERE usage_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY usage_date DESC, model
SELECT * FROM llm_usage_daily WHERE model=#{model} ORDER BY usage_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(request_count),0) AS total_calls, COALESCE(SUM(prompt_tokens),0) AS total_prompt_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(completion_tokens),0) AS total_completion_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens),0) AS total_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(total_cost),0) AS total_cost FROM llm_usage_daily WHERE usage_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate}
